final_state.conclusion: Phase 3F memory maintenance complete. 8 records reviewed across cycles 2-9. Disorder reduced from 5 to 2 through retirement (alpha-stale), duplicate-linking (beta-duplicate-b→beta-duplicate-a), and report obsoletion (ops-report-obsolete). 3 records remain active. 1 conflict (gamma-source-a vs gamma-source-b) remains unresolved and is preserved as contested. All actions are reversible. No data destroyed. No provenance errors. Memory surface is clean and ready for next operational cycle.

maintenance_actions.rationale: Stale alpha record superseded by alpha-current (v2). No independent information value retained.

Obsolete operations report superseded by ops-report-current. Prior report cycle retained but retired from active set.
